archetype: Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast (Customized with Gold accents)

rules: No full-screen gold or black backgrounds. Rely on white (#FFFFFF) with 10% grey (#F9F9F9) for structure.
Gold (#D4AF37) is reserved ONLY for interaction highlights, tiny overlines, button borders, and selected active states.
The 'Tinted Grey' Rule: Neutral greys should lean cool or neutral, never muddy.
Never use pure black (#000000) for text. Use deep obsidian (#0A0A0A).

headings.style: Wide geometric sans, authoritative but modern.
headings.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-bold
headings.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-semibold

typography.overlines: Uppercase, tiny text-xs tracking-[0.2em] text-[#D4AF37] font-semibold
rules: DO NOT USE INTER, ROBOTO, OR OPEN SANS for headings.
Headings over 32px MUST use tracking-tight or tracking-tighter.
Hierarchy Gap Rule: Never jump from text-6xl to text-sm. Use text-xl for subheadings.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing. Use 2-3x more white space than standard SaaS designs to achieve the premium 'Awwwards' feel. (e.g., py-32 for sections).
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Use The 'Bento' Protocol for the gallery (Tetris Grid). Asymmetrical blocks, wide gaps (gap-8).
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align dense text and headings for readability. Only center in the main hero if visually balanced.
layout_and_spacing.containers: Max width 7xl for standard content, larger for bleeding images.

components.buttons: Flat, sharp edges (rounded-none or rounded-sm). Primary button: bg-[#0A0A0A] text-white hover:bg-[#D4AF37] transition-colors. Secondary button: bg-transparent border border-[#0A0A0A] text-[#0A0A0A] hover:bg-[#F9F9F9].
components.navigation: Sticky, glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70) with 1px border-b border-border/40. Links MUST be visible on desktop (no hamburger on md/lg).
components.cards: Cardless or completely flat. Subtle 1px borders (border-[#E5E7EB]), zero shadow, or extremely faint ambient shadow (shadow-sm) on hover.
components.forms: Shadcn UI Input/Textarea but heavily customized: h-12, flat borders, focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#D4AF37] focus:border-[#D4AF37].
components.lightbox: For the gallery, clicking a photo MUST open a full-screen lightbox overlay (bg-black/90) to display the large image.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Images slightly scale up inside their container (overflow-hidden) with a slow ease transition. Links have an underline expansion or subtle gold color shift.
motion_and_interactions.reveal: Use simple staggered fade-ups for section content.

domov.title: Domov
sections: Hero: Minimalist layout. Massive H1 (Judo Klub Izola), gold accent overline, large high-quality action shot (Technique demo photo).
News Spotlight 1 (Asymmetric layout): Olympic champion Andrea Leški visiting for special training. Use Photo 1 (Training supervision).
News Spotlight 2: Celebration of winning a public grant project. Clean text block, bold stats/typography.
Affiliated Clubs: Horizontal marquee or bento grid showing the 4 club logos (Logo 1 asset).

o_nas.title: O nas
sections: History/About: Clean typography-focused layout. Ample white space.
Team/Values: Use Photo 3 (Young judoists) in a large edge-to-edge or rounded-none container.

galerija.title: Galerija
sections: Bento Grid / Masonry: Show all judo photos. MUST include thumbnail view with click-to-enlarge (Lightbox) functionality.

kontakt.title: Kontakt
sections: Split layout (lg:grid-cols-2). Left: Contact info, map placeholder, large typography. Right: Minimalist clean form (Shadcn customized).

images.description: Affiliated Clubs Logos (Izola, Ankaran, Marezige, Babič)

instructions_to_main_agent: You are executing a design by E1. The site is for an elite sports club, so use sharp, clean edges. NO cutesy soft borders unless explicitly modifying a Shadcn default.
Implement routing for the 4 pages (Domov, O nas, Galerija, Kontakt).
Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements, navigation links, and buttons.
Install Google Fonts 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' in your HTML/CSS.
Ensure 'Domov' hero uses an impactful image layout (avoid generic Vercel look).
Use framer-motion or standard CSS for smooth image reveal/scale on hover in the gallery.
For the gallery lightbox, use a simple React state or Dialog from Shadcn configured to be full screen.
Use Phosphor icons or Lucide for UI arrows and symbols.
Strictly follow the color palette. DO NOT inject teal, purple, or generic blue.
